title: oxalis integra
intro: Oxalis integra, also known as the purple wood sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family and is native to Eastern Asia. The plant contains oxalic acid, which has been used for its medicinal properties, such as reducing inflammation and acting as a diuretic. The health benefits of Oxalis integra include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and aid in the treatment of gout and arthritis. Oxalis integra can be prepared as a herbal remedy by making a tea from its leaves and roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
